item.title: LackRack V3

item.title: CBR1100XX Centerstand installation
item.description: For some reason my Honda CBR1100XX Super Blackbird was missing the centerstand. Here’s how you install it on your bike, with parts & …

item.title: Toyota Corolla E120 ethanol conversion.
item.description: Quick guide to install ethanol conversion kit (eFlexFuel) on 2002-2008 Toyota Corolla (E120). I was inspired by ChrisFix’s latest video on …

item.title: HPE Proliant Microserver Gen7 fan mod
item.description: Modding my HPE Proliant Microserver Gen7 (N54L) to be less loud. Also listing the fans which do not work and fans which work. Mostly …

item.title: DIY: Boombox
item.description: I lost my JBL Flip bluetooth speaker, and I always wanted a bit more “boom”, so I decided to build a real boombox. Few things I want to …

item.title: Kuinka madallat autosi vuonna 2020
item.description: Tässä “lyhyt” ohje siitä kuinka madallat autosi 100% laillisesti vuonna 2020 Suomessa. Teksti osittain sarkastista, johtuen prosessin …

item.title: Storage Spaces
item.description: This first documented project has nothing to do with computers or cars or motorcycles, but rather enables me to actually do them, without …
